| `lw` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | $rd = M_w[rs1 + SignExt(offset)]$ | load word | I |
| `lh` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | $rd = SignExt(M_h[rs1 + SignExt(offset)])$ | load half | I |
| `lhu` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | $rd = ZeroExt(M_h[rs1 + SignExt(offset)])$ | load half | I |
| `lb` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | $rd = SignExt(M_b[rs1 + SignExt(offset)])$ | load byte | I |
| `lbu` | `rd, offset(rs1)` | $rd = ZeroExt(M_b[rs1 + SignExt(offset)])$ | load byte | I |
| `sw` | `rs2, offset(rs1)` | $M_w[rs1 + SignExt(offset)] = rs2$ | store word | S |
| `sh` | `rs2, offset(rs1)` | $M_h[rs1 + SignExt(offset)] = rs2_{15..0}$ | store half | S |
| `sb` | `rs2, offset(rs1)` | $M_b[rs1 + SignExt(offset)] = rs2_{7..0}$ | store byte | S |
